work_unit: fix ES-H003: atomic safe_write_json in decision-observer.py
situation: audit-2026-07-04-001 finding ES-H003 (priority 3, route-fix): decision-observer.py L140-147 safe_write_json uses non-atomic open('w')+json.dump. Process crash/interrupt mid-write leaves partial/corrupt JSON file — same vuln pattern as stop-completion-gate case-2026-07-04-404. status.json is the primary victim (engine stage tracking).
action: Replace safe_write_json with tempfile.mkstemp + os.fdopen + fsync + os.replace atomic pattern. Add 'import tempfile'. Mirrors the fix already applied to stop-completion-gate.py. Worktree opened new opt-decision-observer-1783099363 because opt-hooks-1783018753 had unmerged decision-observer.py changes (cp-guard correctly blocked overwrite).
outcome_evidence: python3 ast.parse confirms syntax OK; opt-worktree.sh commit succeeded and pushed to origin/auto/opt-decision-observer-1783099363; cp-guard prevented collision with opt-hooks-1783018753 unmerged commits.
next_suggestion: merge opt-hooks-1783018753 (5 pending fixes including ES-H001) — this will also unblock future hooks-area worktrees
after both merges, next derived fix: ES-M001 (route-health-scorer E3 score always max)
